sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check the segmentation to understand exact positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Print compact info about each node
for n in nodes:
    # Get bounding box from boundary
    boundary = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in boundary]
    cols = [p[1] for p in boundary]
    min_r, max_r = min(rows), max(rows)
    min_c, max_c = min(cols), max(cols)
    center_r = (min_r + max_r) // 2
    center_c = (min_c + max_c) // 2
    print(f"id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} bbox=[{min_r},{min_c}]-[{max_r},{max_c}] center=({center_r},{center_c}) children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
